rationale: The proposed change concerns the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §25.156 governs student religious expression in public schools. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 25.156. MODEL POLICY GOVERNING VOLUNTARY RELIGIOUS EXPRESSION IN PUBLIC SCHOOLS.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no overlap in subject matter.
